_meta.description: Canonical model corpus. Single source of truth for fixtures across all layers (lexer, flat, ptable, matrix_rep, fit). Models grow as later phases land.

models.notes: Minimal 1-factor CFA. Exercises =~, +, identifiers.

models.model:
visual =~ x1 + x2 + x3
textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
speed =~ x7 + x8 + x9
models.notes: Holzinger-Swineford 3-factor structure. Exercises multi-statement bodies separated by newlines.
Trailing '+' continues across newline.
Marker indicator fixed to 1 via numeric*identifier modifier.
Equality across loadings via shared label modifier.
Mixes '*' (fix) and '?' (start-value shorthand) modifiers.
Equality and inequality constraints separated by ';'.
Defined parameter via :=. Exercises Pratt-parsed expr in P4.
Latent variance via ~~ on the same variable.
Residual covariance between two indicators.
Simple multi-predictor regression.
Intercept form. The parser treats `~ 1` specially; the lexer does not.
Quoted-string label modifier.

models.model: f =~ x1 + x2 + x3; y ~ f
models.notes: Two statements separated by ';' on a single line.
Modifier function start(v).
Multi-group per-row modifier via c(...).

models.model:
f =~ x1 # marker indicator
     + x2 ! second loading
     + x3
models.notes: Comments using both # and !, interleaved with multi-line continuation.
Explicit NA modifier (free with no fixed value).
Pure path analysis on HolzingerSwineford1939 — exercises Reduced LISREL with no user latents (everything in Β/Ψ).

models.model:
visual =~ x1 + x2 + x3
x9 ~ visual
models.notes: CFA + structural on HolzingerSwineford1939 — exercises Mixed form (Λ + phantom-Λ identity for x9 + Β).
Multi-group 1F CFA across HolzingerSwineford1939 `school`. Lavaan auto-adds intercepts (ν free, α fixed at 0). Saturated → df = 0.

models.model:
visual =~ x1 + x2 + x3
textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
speed =~ x7 + x8 + x9
models.notes: Multi-group 3F CFA across HolzingerSwineford1939 `school` (configural). Lavaan auto-enables meanstructure for multi-group, so meanstructure=true here to match. Over-identified: df = 48. Reference for multi-group Browne residual NT and RLS chi².
